typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DestinationTable as string (),
	FileDate as string (),
	FileDateDt as timestamp (),
	FileDateStr as string (),
	FileName as string (),
	PackageExecutionID as integer (),
	QueryReadffromSrcDupe as string (),
	RowsDeleted as integer (),
	RowsDiscarded as integer (),
	RowsInserted as integer (),
	RowsNotWrittenError as integer (),
	RowsReadError as integer (),
	RowsReadNoError as integer (),
	RowsUpdated as integer (),
	FileArchiveDir as string (),
	FilePattern as string (),
	FileProcessDir as string (),
	ParentPackageExecutionID as integer ()
}

source(output(
		{INVOICE #} as string,
		InvoiceBK as string,
		{CUST CODE} as string,
		{CUST Ship to} as string,
		{PROJECT NUMBER} as string,
		BRANCH as string,
		{SALES AGENT 1} as string,
		{SALES AGENT 2} as string,
		{INVOICED BY} as string,
		{INV DATE} as string,
		{DUE DATE} as string,
		{CREATED DATE} as string,
		{OPEN A R} as string,
		{CBG CODE} as string,
		{JOURNAL #} as string,
		reference as string,
		{ORIGINAL AMOUNT} as string,
		TAX as string,
		RETAINAGE as string,
		FileDate as string,
		FileName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::QueryReadffromSrcDupe',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource derive({INVOICE #} = {INVOICE #}) ~> PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError
OLEDBSource derive() ~> OLEDBSourceErrorReformat
PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError derive(ETLCreateDate = $System__StartTime,
		ETLExecutionID = $User__PackageExecutionID) ~> DeriveAuditandOtherColumns
OLEDBSourceErrorReformat derive() ~> OLEDBSource0
DeriveAuditandOtherColumns derive(ETLCreateDate = ETLCreateDate) ~> PlaceHolderGetCheckSum
OLEDBSource0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> OLEDBSourceERROROUTPUTFILE
PlaceHolderGetCheckSum sink(input(
		ETLCreateDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		BRANCH as string,
		DUE_DATE as string,
		InvoiceChecksum as string,
		CREATED_DATE as string,
		INVOICED_BY as string,
		RETAINAGE as string,
		FileName as string,
		PROJECT_NUMBER as string,
		CBG_CODE as string,
		CUST_Ship_to as string,
		TAX as string,
		INV_DATE as string,
		SALES_AGENT_1 as string,
		reference as string,
		SALES_AGENT_2 as string,
		FileDate as string,
		InvoiceBK as string,
		JOURNAL__ as string,
		ORIGINAL_AMOUNT as string,
		ETLExecutionID as long,
		CUST_CODE as string,
		OPEN_A_R as string,
		INVOICE__ as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ETLCreateDate,
		BRANCH,
		DUE_DATE = {DUE DATE},
		InvoiceChecksum = ETLChecksum,
		CREATED_DATE = {CREATED DATE},
		INVOICED_BY = {INVOICED BY},
		RETAINAGE,
		FileName,
		PROJECT_NUMBER = {PROJECT NUMBER},
		CBG_CODE = {CBG CODE},
		CUST_Ship_to = {CUST Ship to},
		TAX,
		INV_DATE = {INV DATE},
		SALES_AGENT_1 = {SALES AGENT 1},
		reference,
		SALES_AGENT_2 = {SALES AGENT 2},
		FileDate,
		InvoiceBK,
		JOURNAL__ = {JOURNAL #},
		ORIGINAL_AMOUNT = {ORIGINAL AMOUNT},
		ETLExecutionID,
		CUST_CODE = {CUST CODE},
		OPEN_A_R = {OPEN A R},
		INVOICE__ = {INVOICE #})) ~> WritetoTarget
